revision.comment: Reverted edit by [[Special:Contribs/Uzume|Uzume]] ([[User talk:Uzume|talk]]) to last version by Biogeographist
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[WorldCat]] by its [[OCLC (identifier)|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[WorldCat]] by its [[OCLC (identifier)|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[WorldCat]] by its [[OCLC (identifier)|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:refreshing imports]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[WorldCat]] by its [[OCLC (identifier)|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:refreshing imports]] }} [[Category:New]]

{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[WorldCat]] by its [[OCLC (identifier)|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:refreshing imports]] }} [[Category:New]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]]

{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[WorldCat]] by its [[OCLC (identifier)|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:refreshing imports]] }} [[Category:New]]

{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[WorldCat]] by its [[OCLC (identifier)|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:qq]] }} [[Category:New]]

{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[WorldCat]] by its [[OCLC (identifier)|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:New]]

{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[WorldCat]] by its [[OCLC (identifier)|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[WorldCat]] by its [[:en:OCLC|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[:en:WorldCat|WorldCat]] by its [[:en:OCLC|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[:en:WorldCat|WorldCat]] by its [[:en:OCLC|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[:en:WorldCat|WorldCat]] by its [[:en:OCLC|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[:en:WorldCat|WorldCat]] by its [[:en:OCLC|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23520214635|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[:en:WorldCat|WorldCat]] by its [[:en:OCLC|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template generates a link for looking up a single (print or online) publication in [[:en:WorldCat|WorldCat]] by its [[:en:OCLC|OCLC Number]]. It may be used to implement other templates or directly; in both cases, please be sure to make contextually clear that it provides a link to an OCLC search. ;Example *Usage: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} *Links to: [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204 https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/22239204] *Renders as: {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|22239204}} === See also === *{{tl|OCLC}}{{snd}}a similar template with an "OCLC" prefix in the rendered output *{{tl|ISSN}} *{{tl|ISSN link}} *{{tl|Infobox book}}, {{tl|Infobox journal}}, {{tl|Infobox magazine}}, {{tl|Infobox newspaper}}{{snd}}these infobox templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *{{slink|Help:Citation Style 1#Identifiers}}{{snd}}CS1 citation templates include an OCLC identifier; example: |oclc=22239204 *[[Wikipedia:OCLC]]{{snd}}essay about Wikipedia's relationship with OCLC {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:External link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
